faqs.question: What should I bring to my first session?
faqs.answer: Comfortable workout clothes, a water bottle, and a towel. We provide all equipment.

faqs.question: Do you offer meal prep or nutrition guidance?
faqs.answer: Our trainers can point you to general high-protein meal-prep resources during your session; for personalized nutrition plans, ask about our coaching add-on.

faqs.question: What if I have an injury or medical condition?
faqs.answer: Please tell your trainer before starting any session so they can adjust the program safely.
